title: senecio guascensis
intro: Senecio guascensis, also known as Guayacán or Huacacapu, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family, native to the Andean region. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio guascensis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and alleviating pain and inflammation. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by infusing the leaves, flowers, or roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
